title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Tompkinsville, Staten Island
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Tompkinsville, Staten Island. Safe, humane bat control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Bats in your Tompkinsville attic or walls? Best Pest Control NYC provides safe, humane bat removal and exclusion services throughout Tompkinsville and Staten Island. Our licensed specialists use proven methods to remove bats and seal entry points, protecting your property from future infestations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Tompkinsville residents for years with fast, reliable bat control solutions. Our team is fully licensed, insured, and trained in humane bat exclusion techniques that comply with all NYC wildlife regulations.
localContext: Tompkinsville's mix of historic Victorian homes near Von Briesen Park and multi-family buildings along Bay Street often provide ideal roosting spots for bats seeking shelter. The area's proximity to the waterfront and mature trees around Tappen Park creates an attractive habitat for bat populations seeking nearby feeding grounds.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Tompkinsville?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Tompkinsville typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, number of entry points, and the complexity of your property. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Is bat removal in NYC legal and humane?
faqs.answer: Yes. We follow all NYC and New York State regulations for bat removal, using only humane exclusion methods that allow bats to leave safely but prevent re-entry. We never harm bats, as many species are protected, and we time our work to avoid maternity seasons when flightless pups are present.

faqs.question: What does the bat exclusion process involve?
faqs.answer: Our process begins with a thorough inspection to identify all bat entry points and roosting areas. We then install one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to exit but not return, seal all secondary openings, and after all bats have left, we seal the primary exits and clean affected areas to remove guano and odors.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bats from my Tompkinsville home?
faqs.answer: We can typically schedule an inspection within 24-48 hours. The exclusion process usually takes 3-7 days for bats to fully vacate, followed by permanent sealing and cleanup. Timeline may vary based on colony size and property conditions, but we work efficiently to resolve your bat problem as quickly as possible.
